description: Template benchmark suite for the BCER public release. Replace dataset roots with local paths or generate manifests with scripts/manifest_builder.py.

tasks.goal: Run a short denoising workflow and validate the expected output artifact.
Register prostate MRI sequences and validate the aligned output artifact.
Run a long-chain prostate MRI workflow ending in structured report generation.

notes: This file intentionally contains no internal dataset paths.
Paper-result reproduction still needs a separate RESULT_PROVENANCE.md mapping manuscript tables to exact artifacts and commands.
Task contracts and validator fields should be finalized before public release.
